i don t normally write reviews. however, this is the best fps experience i ve had since the fall of battlefield 3 and since the fall of callf of duty modern warfare 2 black ops 1 . it is not a perfect fps since there are still some issues with the in game achievments. altough, i ve played many other fps, this game is simply superior in many ways. a solid 9 10, hoping for a 10 10 experience when they fix the present issues.

you re better off going back to 2042! at least your bullets will register and you can t be killed after going behind solid cover. the only good thing is the destruction and even still bc2 still does it better. most unoptimized ea game in history. every update just makes the game more unplayable and not fun.
this game is way too easy, especially coming from cod, i just run and gun but it s not too satisfying

they drastically reduced some weapon attachment unlock challenges, but left others. there should have only been a halving of some of the challenges if they felt to grindy for most. i can agree that many of the challenges are a bit to much of a grind, but they don t need to be dropped by 90 . weekly challenges forcing players into specific gauntlet or battle royal in order to earn more points is terrible. weekly challenges should mostly be based off classes, weapons, or general objectives so people aren t purposley forced to play game modes for the battle points. terrible forced gameplay and unbanlanced challenge changes.

extremely poor hit detection, maps are so so, all in all a step back from previous battlefields. weapon balancing seems really off as smg s are better at range than assault rifles, bloom is really bad already ack ed by devs as a bug, but still , overall not really worth it for a 90 game.
battlefield 6 out of 10

if you are looking for bf3 or bf4 experience you will be disappointed, better than 2042 and re added class roles but still has that operator background thingy. a mix of cod fast paced shooter game. its not a bad game, its just i was hoping for past bf games style semi realistic shooter where every soldier was generic and is not a universal soldier type unli stamina.

they lied to us, game is exactly what they said they would not do and is currently unplayable bad. this is what you get when you take input from streamers to make a game who have never played battlefield. flew jets in training for 30mins and then decided to jump into a real game and was shocked by how chunky and full of stuttering it is play test was fine so what went wrong.

considering how their whole marketing campaign was spent mocking cod, they ve done literally everything they can to copy and paste the cod identity for larger profit margins, such a giant slap in the face to bf players that were led to believe they d get an experience like bf4. the entire grounded shooter marketing tactic turned out to be purely false advertising. do not waste your time on this bs the suits behind ea and dice only care about their profit margins, not producing a good bf game that people can actually enjoy.

this game perpetually keeps me in a state of simmering anger, anger that so desperately wants to make me throw my keyboard through a wall. either you are getting bent over a table without lube by an attack helicopter, or getting lasered by an smg from sniper range, and there is very little middle ground. i can only play this game for an hour and half at a time before i get too angry. i love this game and series, have for 15 years since bf3. if you are on blood pressure medication and have zen patience, then this is the game for you
